creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately there are some KDE ports for which there are no binary
packages in FreeBSD 10 at the moment, which in turns prevents the
metaport from being there.

The problem is that x11/kde4-workspace depends on WITH_NEW_XORG=1 to
build, and that is not the default in the build cluster yet for 10. Once
that changes, the packages will start being made.

Most of the KDE ports do have binary packages though, so you'll only
need to build a few yourself.
